title: Apple Q3 Earnings Beat Expectations
full_text: Apple reported strong quarterly earnings today, beating analyst expectations. Revenue grew 12% year over year, driven by strong iPhone sales and services growth. The stock rose sharply in after-hours trading as investors reacted positively to the results.

title: Federal Reserve Holds Interest Rates Steady
full_text: The Federal Reserve announced today it would hold interest rates steady at their current level. Fed Chair Jerome Powell cited persistent inflation concerns as the primary reason for the decision. Markets had widely anticipated this outcome. The central bank's interest rate decision affects borrowing costs across the economy.

title: OpenAI engineer's 'LOL' moment set stage for legal fight with Apple
full_text: When iPhone engineer Chang Liu quit for a job at OpenAI's nascent hardware division, Apple Inc. says he left with more than just years of experience. According to a lawsuit filed Friday, Liu departed with three things: a company-issued MacBook he never returned, confidential design documents, and detailed knowledge of Apple's unreleased hardware roadmap.

title: OpenAI engineer's 'LOL' moment set stage for legal fight with Apple
full_text: Most of OpenAI's Apple recruits came from Ternus' hardware engineering division, and some designers had backed Tan over Ternus for the top hardware job in 2021. When iPhone engineer Chang Liu quit for a job at OpenAI's nascent hardware division, Apple Inc. says he left with more than just years of experience. According to a lawsuit filed Friday, Liu departed with confidential materials and design knowledge central to Apple's ongoing hardware disputes with the AI startup.

title: 'At Every Level': Apple Lawsuit Accuses OpenAI of Stealing Trade Secrets in Massive Scheme
full_text: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI in federal court in Northern California, accusing the AI startup of stealing trade secrets and confidential information to develop consumer hardware products. According to Apple, the scheme involved staff "at every level" of the organization, systematically extracting proprietary hardware knowledge to accelerate OpenAI's own device ambitions.

title: IMF growth downgrade, Fed split and oil fears dominate week in global economy
full_text: The International Monetary Fund forecasts a sluggish global economic growth of three percent this year. US home prices have reached an all-time high, impacting affordability for buyers. Federal Reserve officials are divided on future inflation trends and interest rate policy. The economy, inflation and how those forces could impact the lives of Americans were front and center over the past week, with trips to the grocery store or gas station proving more painful for many households.

title: Dow Jones Futures: Watch Nvidia, Micron, Sandisk, Robinhood As Market Sets Up; Big Earnings Due
full_text: Dow Jones futures will open Sunday evening, along with S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures. Taiwan Semiconductor, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, GE Aerospace headline the first big earnings week. Key inflation reports and Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh are also in focus for the week ahead.

title: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller challenges Trump's call for lower rates
full_text: Waller's stance highlights the Fed's independence, potentially influencing future monetary policy and regulatory approaches, especially in crypto. Christopher Waller, the Federal Reserve governor once appointed by Trump himself, is walking a careful line between advocating rate cuts on his own terms and defending central bank independence.

title: Best CD rates today, Saturday, July 11, 2026: Best account provides 4.10% APY
full_text: Find out how much you could earn by locking in a high CD rate today. The Federal Reserve cut its federal funds rate three times in 2025. So far in 2026, the Fed has left interest rates alone, and so now could be your last chance to lock in a competitive CD rate offering around 4.10% APY.

title: What $5,000 Invested in SpaceX Could Be Worth by 2030
full_text: Predicting where any stock will trade four years out is guesswork, and that goes double for Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ: SPCX), the newly public company most people know as SpaceX. Still, since it now trades on the open market at around $150 per share, investors are asking what a $5,000 stake today could be worth by 2030.
